ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "time_id" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel used */,
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion applied */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "amount_sold" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, refunded, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, PayPal) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the transaction */,
  "shipping_amount" TEXT /* Shipping cost */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Total discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_promo_id FOREIGN KEY ("promo_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_prod_id FOREIGN KEY ("prod_id") REFERENCES products ("prod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "prod_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "cust_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "average_order_value" TEXT /* Average value of the customer's orders */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the channel */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the channel */,
  "performance_score" TEXT /* Performance score for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount offered by the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel where the promotion is active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "actual_spend" TEXT /* Actual amount spent on the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer, more detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., JSON array of permissions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is locked out */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time when the lockout expires */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "email_opt_in" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer opts in for email communications */,
  "sms_opt_in" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer opts in for SMS communications */,
  "newsletter_opt_in" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer opts in for newsletters */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer opts in for marketing communications */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., email, SMS, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., sales summary, customer segmentation) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date range covered by the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)
